failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: XWwn75
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"detail":"Server error '500 Internal Server Error' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-model-api.modal.run/chat'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/500"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-agent-lx27.onrender.com/ask?question=P%0B%F3%9B%AA%B3%C3%B1%C3%85&model=null&thread_id=%24%C3%90%04%1E%1A%C2%A2&rerank_top_k=6&include_untagged_fallback=false&context_answer=%E6%A2%A2%06%C3%99%C2%86m%C2%B1%F3%AF%B4%B0%C2%8B%C2%B8%C2%81%C3%84%1A%F2%90%89%ACw%11%7C%F0%B1%96%A7%C3%8C%C2%9DW&tags=null&rerank=false&query=null&tag_match_mode=%15&lang=null'
